name: claude-launch-browser-workflow
title: Claude Launch States Plus Browser Workflow
description: Short launch-style clips that need a browser app as the background work surface plus Claude prompt-to-completion states, without Finder, Office, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab; use `capture:claude-launch-browser-workflow-prompt` for the prompt beat.
author: UI Backlot contributors
sourcePrompt: Install editable UI Backlot source into a HyperFrames project; keep the copied HTML/CSS/JS editable.
